name: pinta-codex
description: Generic OTLP forwarder for Codex hook events

interface.shortDescription: Forward Codex hook events to any OTLP/HTTP collector
interface.longDescription: Captures Codex hook events, converts them to OTLP spans, and sends them to any OTLP/HTTP traces collector. Use with Pinta Manager for managed identity attribution, or any OTel pipeline of your choice.
defaultPrompt: Review code with Pinta telemetry enabled.
Send Codex tool activity to my Pinta endpoint.
Trace this coding session for security review.
